notes: Holy element; area 7x7 (Lv1-7), 11x11 (Lv8-10); chance to inflict Adoração debuff per level (4%-40%)
Holy element; area 3x3; range 11 cells

formula: ATQ = [(HP atual ÷ 50) + (SP Máx. ÷ 4)] × [(Nv. da habilidade × Nv. de base) ÷ 100] × [90 + (Nv. de Adestrar Dragão × 10)]%
specialFormula: Uses current HP, max SP, skill level, base level, Dragon Training level. Dragon Training adds 10% per level (90% base). Ignores evasion. No racial/elemental bonus applies.
notes: Water element by default; can change to Ghost (Othila rune) or Neutral (Luxanima rune); ranged physical; 15% chance Hypothermia 10s

formula: ATQ = [(HP atual ÷ 50) + (SP Máx. ÷ 4)] × [(Nv. da habilidade × Nv. de base) ÷ 1500] × [90 + (Nv. de Adestrar Dragão × 10)]%
specialFormula: Uses current HP, max SP, skill level, base level, Dragon Training level. Divisor is 1500 (vs 100 for water version). Ignores evasion. No racial/elemental bonus applies.
notes: Fire element by default; can change to Holy or Dark via runes; ranged physical; 15% chance Burning 10s

specialFormula: With lances: 400/800/1200/1600/2000%. With 2H swords: hits 2 times at 250/500/750/1000/1250% each hit.
notes: Weapon element; 2H sword causes 2 hits; lance deals more damage; cooldown decreases per level

formula: ATQ = {[(Dano base) + (Nv. de Per. em Espiral × 50)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Damage scales with Spiral Pierce skill level (+50% per level). Hits 5 times. Cast time decreases per level.
notes: Ranged physical; 5 hits; range 7 cells; cast time decreases by 0.1s per level
Melee AoE 9x9; critical hits enabled (CRIT = user's CRIT stat); uninterruptible cast

formula: Dano = {[Nv. da arma × (Refino da arma + 6) × 100] + ATQ da arma + Peso da arma}%
specialFormula: Weapon level, refinement, base ATK and weight-based. Enhances next basic attack. Stacks with Força Titânica (2.5x multiplier). 20% weapon break chance per hit.
notes: Level 1 only; costs 1 Raido rune; next basic attack enhanced; 20% chance to break own weapon; effect ends on weapon change or attack

formula: ATQ = {[(Dano base + Nv. de Perícia com Lança × 10) ÷ Nv. de base] ÷ 150}%
specialFormula: Pulls target toward caster. Damage scales with Spear Mastery level.
notes: Requires spear; ranged 5-9 cells; pulls target; ineffective vs boss monsters and PvP
Ranged; accuracy bonus +7% to +70% per level; range 7-11 cells; can crit; requires Encantar Lâmina Lv3

specialFormula: Generates 1 Rotation Point per use (max 10 pts, 10s duration) used by Castigo de Loki.
notes: Melee AoE; 3x3 (Lv1-2), 5x5 (Lv3-4), 7x7 (Lv5); requires katar; generates Rotation Points for Castigo de Loki

specialFormula: Damage adds Rotation Points × 200 and AGI × 3. Does not consume rotation points. Requires katar.
notes: Ranged 9-13 cells; requires active rotation points; range increases per level; requires katar

specialFormula: Critical hits possible at half user's CRIT. After-cast delay decreases per level.
notes: Melee physical; critical chance = CRIT ÷ 2; SP cost 40; after-cast delay decreases sharply with level

formula: ATQ base; bonus when target has Ferida de Corvo: normal +30/60/90/100/150%, boss +15/30/45/60/75%
specialFormula: Applies Ferida de Corvo debuff (20s) increasing physical melee damage taken. Debuff applies even on miss.
notes: Melee range 1 cell; 60s cooldown; applies Ferida de Corvo debuff; cancels damage reflection; debuff applies even on miss

specialFormula: Chance to auto-cast Lâminas Retalhadoras: 4/8/12/16/20% per level. Range increases with level.
notes: Ranged physical 100% ATK; range = skill level + 4 cells; chance to proc Lâminas Retalhadoras increases per level

formula: ATQM por cristal = [(Nv. da habilidade × 100) + 200] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)
specialFormula: Each crystal deals damage independently. Number of crystals equals skill level (1-5). Total damage = per-crystal × crystals.
notes: Water element; area 7x7 (Lv1-2), 9x9 (Lv3-4), 11x11 (Lv5); 30-50% chance Hypothermia 10s; frozen targets auto-hit

formula: ATQM normal = {[(Nv. da habilidade × 300) + 1000] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Against chilled targets: ATQM = {[(Nv. da habilidade × 600) + 1200] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}% = [1800/2400/3000/3600/4200]%
notes: Water element; bonus damage vs chilled targets (approx 38-68% more); area 7x7 to 11x11; range 11 cells
Fire element; area 7x7; knockback 3 cells; 5s cooldown

specialFormula: Cast time increases with level: 2 + (Skill Level + 5) seconds.
notes: Neutral element; area 13x13; range 11 cells; applies Vício Mágico (-50% phys/magic resist) 20s; cast time scales with level

formula: ATQM por esfera = Nv. × 400 + 800 (base values shown per level)
specialFormula: Consumes all 4 elemental spheres, dealing 4 hits each with element of its sphere. Status effects per sphere with 100% chance. Area effect at Lv6+.
notes: Element matches sphere type (Fire/Water/Wind/Earth); 4 hits; requires 4 elemental spheres; 100% status chance per sphere; area 3x3 to 7x7 at Lv6+

formula: ATQM = {[(Nv. da habilidade × 200) + INT] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: INT added to base damage. Heals caster for a portion of damage dealt (74-90% conversion by level).
notes: Neutral element; range 9 cells; heals caster 74/78/82/86/90% of damage; INT adds to base damage

specialFormula: INT added to base damage. Doubles damage when target is in Exílio (Exile) status.
notes: Ghost element; area 3x3 (Lv1-3), 5x5 (Lv4-5); range 11 cells; INT adds to base; doubles vs Exílio status
Earth element; linear AoE 15x5 to 15x9; 6-10 earth spikes; cast time = 1 + Level + 1 seconds

formula: Fire: [(Nv. da habilidade × 400)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)%; Dark follow-up: [(Nv. da habilidade × 600)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)%
specialFormula: Two-phase: 1 fire hit then 3 dark hits. Fire: 400/800/1200/1600/1800%. Dark (each): 600/1200/1800/2400/3000%.
notes: Fire (1 hit) + Dark (3 hits) = 4 total hits; area 3x3 (Lv1-3), 5x5 (Lv4-5); range 11 cells

formula: Dano por corrente = {[100 × (9 - Nº de correntes)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Chain damage reduces with each subsequent target hit. Number of chains = skill level + 4. First chain = (9-1)×100 = 800%.
notes: Wind element; 5-9 chain targets; area 5x5 to 7x7; damage decreases per chain; requires Invocar Esfera de Vento Lv1

specialFormula: Ignores DEF and evasion. Element determined by equipped cannon ball.
notes: Physical ranged; ignores DEF and evasion; element from cannon ball; AoE 3x3 (Lv1-3), 5x5 (Lv4-5); cast time decreases per level

specialFormula: DEX added to base damage. Requires 1 Cápsula Incandescente ammo.
notes: AoE 5x5; range 13 cells; 3 levels only; DEX adds to damage; requires Incandescent Capsule ammo

specialFormula: VIT added to base damage.
notes: Melee AoE 5x5 (Lv1-2), 7x7 (Lv3-5); VIT contributes to damage; requires Axe Mastery Lv1

specialFormula: DEX added to base damage.
notes: Ranged single target; range 11 cells; DEX adds to damage; requires Piloting License Lv1; ejects MECHA fist as projectile

formula: Impact ATQ: weapon %; Volcano tick: fixed neutral damage 1000-1800 every 0.5s (not affected by DEF or element)
specialFormula: Impact uses weapon property/ATK (500-700%). Volcano creates secondary fixed damage field: 1000/1200/1400/1600/1800 fixed neutral damage per 0.5s tick.
notes: Fire element; AoE 7x7; 90% stun on impact; volcano persists and deals fixed neutral damage; max 3 volcanoes active
Fire element; 3 levels; AoE 5x5 to 9x9; 30-50% burn chance; 7-21s burn; requires 1 Gasoline per use
Water element; 3 levels; AoE 5x5 to 9x9; 10-30% Hypothermia, 30-50% Freeze; requires Liquid Nitrogen + Gasoline; uninterruptible

formula: ATQ = {[(Nv. da hab. × 50) + 250] + Peso do machado} × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)
specialFormula: Axe weight adds to base damage. Knockback (Level + 1) cells.
notes: Ranged; boomerang pattern; knockback; axe weight contributes to damage; range = Level + 4 cells

specialFormula: STR added to damage. 40/55/70% chance to remove positive buffs from target.
notes: 3 levels; melee; STR adds to damage; removes target buffs with scaling chance; requires Pile Bunker weapon

formula: Dano = {[Fator × (Nv. de Reforçar Estrutura + 8)] × (SP restante + VIT) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)} + HP restante
specialFormula: Factor: Lv1=2, Lv2=3, Lv3=4. Uses remaining SP, VIT, base level, and remaining HP. Ignores evasion. Consumes all SP.
notes: Neutral; AoE 5x5/7x7/9x9; consumes all SP; 300s cooldown; ignores evasion; requires Detonator item + 3 Gasoline

formula: ATQ = {(Skill Level × 200) + [Current Cart Weight ÷ (150 - Base STR)] + (Aprimorar Carrinho Level × 50)}%
specialFormula: Cart weight and Cart Upgrade skill level contribute to damage. STR reduces cart weight divisor.
notes: Weapon element; AoE 5x5; cart weight and STR affect damage; Aprimorar Carrinho adds 50% per level

specialFormula: Cart Upgrade level adds 20% per level to base. INT × 2 added to base.
notes: Element from cannon ball; AoE 3x3/3x3/5x5/5x5/7x7; range 8-12 cells; INT adds to damage; cart required

formula: ATQ vs monsters = {[(Skill Level × 200) + (User INT × 2) + (Skill Level × Target VIT)] × (Base Level ÷ 100)}
specialFormula: vs players: ATQ = {(Skill Level × 100) + (User INT + [Target VIT ÷ (Skill Level ÷ 2)]} × (Base Level ÷ 100). Hits = skill level. 1-10% armor break chance per level.
notes: Hits = skill level (1-10 hits); target VIT contributes to damage; 1-10% armor break; requires Acid Bottle + Fire Bottle

formula: ATQ = {[Dano base + (Nv. de Criar M. Planta x INT)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Summon skill: plant attacks every 0.3 seconds. INT and Create Carnivorous Plant level add to damage.
notes: Summon plant that attacks every 0.3s; weapon element; AoE 5x5; duration 60-300s; requires Plant Flask
Fire element; AoE 5x5; range 9 cells; 8-24% burn chance; burn 8-18s; SP cost 20 + Level × 4

specialFormula: INT added to base damage. Applies Esporão debuff (+10% physical ranged damage taken).
notes: Ranged physical; INT adds to damage; AoE 3x3 to 11x11; Esporão debuff 5s (+10% phys ranged dmg, +5% vs boss)

specialFormula: Bonus damage in Disparo Selvagem state: 835/870/905/940/975/1010/1045/1080/1115/1150%. Requires 3 arrows.
notes: Ranged bow; 3 arrows consumed; single target; bonus damage in Wild Shot state; requires bow

specialFormula: Bonus in Disparo Selvagem state: 450/700/950/1200/1450/1700/1950/2200/2450/2700%. 5 arrows fired. Hits stealthed targets.
notes: Ranged bow; 5 arrows; AoE 5x5 to 9x9; bonus in Wild Shot state; hits hidden targets; requires bow

specialFormula: Trap changes monster element to Fire. Damage formula not documented. AoE 5x5.
notes: Trap skill; changes target element to fire; AoE 5x5; damage formula not available on wiki

formula: ATQ = Dano base + {(Nv. da hab. × DES) + (INT × 5) × [1,5 + (Nv. de base ÷ 100)]} × [(Nv. de P. com Armadilha × 20) ÷ 50]
specialFormula: Complex: DEX, INT, base level and Trap Mastery all contribute. Trap remains 15s. AoE 7x7.
notes: Neutral; trap placed on ground, explodes; melee physical contact type; 15s duration; 7x7 AoE

formula: ATQ = {[(Dano base) + (Nv. de Lança do Destino × 80)] × Nv. de base ÷ 100]}%
specialFormula: Lança do Destino level adds 80% per level to base. Grants Lança Lunar buff that boosts Lança do Destino.
notes: AoE 7x7; grants Lança Lunar buff 2-10s; requires spear; cooldown decreases per level

formula: ATQ = {[(Dano base + FOR + DES) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: STR and DEX both add to base damage. Under Lança Lunar buff: 450/900/1350/1800/2250%.
notes: AoE 7x7; STR and DEX add to damage; Lança Lunar buff increases damage by 50%; requires spear

formula: ATQ = {[(Nv. da habilidade × 200) + (FOR + Peso do escudo)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100) + (VIT × Refino do escudo)}%
specialFormula: Shield weight and VIT × shield refinement added to damage. Ignores evasion.
notes: Neutral; melee; shield weight, STR, VIT, shield refinement all contribute; ignores evasion; not weapon ATK-based

specialFormula: AGI × 5 added to base. Always critical hit. Base level divisor is 120 instead of 100.
notes: Always crits; AGI × 5 adds to damage; base level divisor 120; level 1 Bleeding 35%, levels 2-5 equipment breaks; spear required

specialFormula: Can critical hit at half user's CRIT rate.
notes: Ranged 7 cells; AoE 3x3 (Lv1-2), 5x5 (Lv3-5); can crit at CRIT ÷ 2; requires spear

specialFormula: VIT added to base. Under Consagração: 450/900/1350/1800/2250% (50% bonus).
notes: Melee; VIT adds to damage; 50% bonus under Consagração; range 1 cell

formula: ATQ = {(Rage Points × 200) + [(Max HP - Current HP) ÷ 100] × (Base Level ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Rage Points × 200 is core multiplier. HP deficit adds bonus damage. Cannot miss.
notes: Level 1 only; melee range 1; consumes all rage points; HP deficit adds damage; cannot miss; SP cost 150

specialFormula: AGI × 2 added to base. Doubles with daggers. Accuracy penalty at low levels, bonus at high levels.
notes: Melee AoE; AGI × 2 adds damage; doubles with daggers; accuracy -30 (Lv1) to +20 (Lv10); AoE 3x3 to 5x5

specialFormula: AGI × 3 added to base. Requires 3 arrows. Triangle shot pattern.
notes: Ranged bow; 3 arrows; triangle pattern; AGI × 3 adds damage; range 7-11 cells; requires Rajada de Flechas Lv7

specialFormula: DEX + AGI averaged and added to base. With instrument/whip: 120/240/360/480/600%. Rain lasts 3.3s hitting every 0.3s = max 12 hits. 10 arrows consumed.
notes: Rain effect 3.3s; hits every 0.3s (max 12 hits); AoE 11x11; range 9; 10 arrows; DEX+AGI contribute; bow or whip/instrument

specialFormula: Musical Mastery level × 60 added to base. 150% bonus vs sleeping targets.
notes: Neutral magical; 150% damage vs Sleep/Deep Sleep targets; cast time increases per level; Musical Mastery adds 60 per level to base

formula: ATQ = [(ATQ base) + (Nv. de Domínio Musical × 50) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)]%
specialFormula: Doubles to 1500/2500/3500/4500/5500% when used in group/duo. Musical Mastery adds 50 per level.
notes: Ranged 9 cells; AoE 5x5 to 9x9; doubles in group play; Musical Mastery contributes to base; requires Ruído Estridente Lv1
Melee range 2; 2-11% stun chance per level; combo entry for Ruína; SP cost very low

specialFormula: STR × 100 added to base damage. Combo from Punho do Dragão. Enables Garra de Tigre/Portões do Inferno combo.
notes: STR × 100 adds significant damage; combo chain: Dragon Combo → Ruin → Tiger Cannon/Gates of Hell; consumes spirit spheres

formula: ATQ normal = {[(Fator ÷ 4.0) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)] + [Dano Especial + (Nv. base do alvo × 40)]}%
specialFormula: Factor = (HP current %) × 12-30 + (SP current %) × 6-15 by level. Combo: divide factor by 1.5 instead of 4.0. Damage is irreducible. Ignores evasion. 2 spirit spheres.
notes: HP and SP based damage; irreducible; ignores evasion; combo after Ruína boosts by ~2.67x factor; 2 spirit spheres; AoE 3x3 to 7x7

formula: ATQ = [(Skill Level × 500) × Base Level ÷ 100] + [(Max HP - Current HP) + Extra Damage]%
specialFormula: Extra: without combo = (Factor × Current SP) + (Base Level × 10); with Ruína combo = (Factor × Max SP) + (Base Level × 40). Factor = 1.2-3.0 by level. Combo: 800/1600/2400/3200/4000/4800/5600/6400/7200/8000%.
notes: Neutral ranged 7 cells; HP deficit + SP add damage; combo multiplies SP contribution; 2 spirit spheres; uninterruptible cast

formula: [(Skill Level × 300) + (STR × 3) × (Base Level ÷ 100)]% vs visible; [(Skill Level × 400) + (STR × 5) × (Base Level ÷ 100)]% vs hidden
specialFormula: STR × 3 (visible) or STR × 5 (hidden) added. Bonus damage vs hidden targets: 400/800/1200/1600/2000%.
notes: AoE 3x3 to 11x11; STR contributes; bonus vs hidden; applies Impactado debuff 5s; melee physical

formula: {[Base Damage + (Fury Level × 200)] × (Base Level ÷ 100)}% normal; {[Base Damage + (Fury Level × 300)] × (Base Level ÷ 100)}% vs Impactado
specialFormula: Inner Fury level multiplies 200 per level (or 300 vs Impacted). Requires 3 spirit spheres + Inner Fury active.
notes: AoE 7x7; requires Inner Fury; Fury level multiplies damage; bonus vs Impactado targets; 3 spirit spheres; requires Impacto Sísmico Lv2

specialFormula: AGI added to base damage.
notes: Melee AoE 5x5; AGI adds damage; self-centered

formula: Base: [(ATQ base) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)]; Collision bonus: (ATQ colisão) + [1000 × Peso Atual do alvo ÷ Peso Total do alvo] + (Nv. base do alvo × 5) × (Nv. base do usuário ÷ 150)
specialFormula: Collision bonus uses target weight ratio and target/user base levels. Collision damage: 700/900/1100/1300/1500/1700/1900/2100/2300/2500%.
notes: Ranged 7-11 cells; pushes then collision bonus; target weight affects collision dmg; consumes 1 spirit sphere (free Lv6+)

specialFormula: With knuckle weapon: 90/180/270/360/450% per hit. Hits = skill level. Multiple hits in AoE 3x3 to 7x7.
notes: Ranged 11 cells; AoE 3x3 to 7x7; hits = skill level; knuckle weapon greatly boosts damage; 2 spirit spheres

formula: Dano = [(Nv. de base + DES) × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)]%
specialFormula: DEX and base level both contribute. Base level used in both the flat addition and the scaling divisor.
notes: AoE 5x5; stun 1-4s; forces players to sit; ineffective vs boss; DEX and base level contribute; 1 level only

specialFormula: INT × 3 added to base. With staff/2H staff: hits doubled (6/8/10/12/14 hits). Element adjustable via elemental mastery.
notes: Neutral (adjustable: Fire/Water/Wind/Earth/Poison); waves every 0.5s; AoE 7x7 to 11x11; staff doubles wave count; INT × 3 adds damage

formula: ATQM = {[(Skill Level + 2) × INT] + (Frost Enchant Level × 300)} × (Base Level ÷ 100)
specialFormula: INT is the primary multiplier (scaled by skill level + 2). Frost Enchant adds 300 per level.
notes: Water element; AoE 7x7 to 9x9; 10-30% crystallization; INT-based damage; Frost Enchant skill multiplies further

formula: ATQM = {[(Skill Level + 2) × INT] + (Earthquake Enchant Level × 300)} × (Base Level ÷ 100)
specialFormula: INT is primary multiplier. Earthquake Enchant adds 300 per level. Bleeding chance 5-25%.
notes: Earth element; AoE 7x7 to 9x9; 5-25% bleeding 8-20s; INT-based; Earthquake Enchant multiplies further; range 9 cells

specialFormula: INT × 3 added. Cloud reduces poison resistance on targets. Only 1 cloud active at a time.
notes: Poison cloud persists 5s; reduces enemy poison resistance -5% to -25%; INT × 3 adds damage; 1 cloud limit

specialFormula: INT added. Under Infection (Jormungand curse) status: 1500/2000/2500/3000/3500%.
notes: Poison; AoE 3x3 to 7x7; INT adds damage; massive bonus vs Infection status; range 9 cells; requires Jormungand Lv2

formula: ATQM = {[(Encanto de Órion + Encantar com Ventania) × 150] + [(INT ÷ 2) × (Nv. da habilidade + 4)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Both Orion Enchant and Sylph Enchant levels combined × 150 added to INT-based formula.
notes: Wind element; AoE 3x3 to 9x9; 5-50% stun 1-2s; INT-based; Orion + Ventania enchants add flat bonus; range 9 cells

formula: ATQM = {[(Dano base + (Nv. de Lanças × 100)] × (Nv. de base ÷ 100)}%
specialFormula: Lance skill level × 100 added to base. Element matches interrupted lance type. Converts basic attacks to magical. Costs 20 SP per attack.
notes: Buff 30-180s; converts basic attacks to magical element of active lance; costs 20 SP per swing; Lance level adds 100 per level to damage

specialFormula: Crowd control skill: pulls enemies in and immobilizes. Duration formula: [2 + (Level × 2)] - (Target STR ÷ 20) seconds.
notes: Wind CC skill; pulls and immobilizes; AoE 3x3 to 7x7; duration reduced by target STR; 4-12s base duration

specialFormula: Support/debuff skill - petrifies targets. No direct damage formula.
notes: Status: petrification; no direct damage

formula: ATQM bonus = [(Nv. da habilidade × 20) + 100] × [(Nv. de base ÷ 100)] + INT
specialFormula: Adds flat MATK bonus (+120 to +300) to basic attacks. INT contributes. Does not affect skills.
notes: Support buff 300s; adds MATK to basic attacks only; INT adds to bonus; can be cancelled by Dispel

formula: ATQ = {[(HP do alvo ÷ 100) × Nv. da habilidade] × (Nv. de base ÷ 125)}%
specialFormula: Reactive counter skill; activates on incoming melee attacks; damage based on target HP and base level. Divisor 125 instead of 100.
notes: Reactive counter; amplifies and reflects melee; target pushed back 3 cells; user receives 10% reflected damage; ineffective vs boss
